avengers.name: Avengers
avengers.description: Team of Marvel Comics superheroes assembled to face threats no single hero could withstand alone.

fantastic-four.name: Fantastic Four
fantastic-four.description: Team of explorers who gained superpowers after exposure to cosmic radiation during a space mission.

x-men.name: X-Men
x-men.description: Team of Marvel Comics mutants fighting for a world where humans and mutants can coexist peacefully, led by Professor Xavier.
